query: SELECT id, provider, tenantId, locationId, eventType, status, errorMessage, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created FROM webhook_events WHERE eventType LIKE '%Opportunity%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
